reasoning.research_depth: Exceptional depth from a world-renowned valuation professor. Academic rigor with real-world application. Primary source material.
reasoning.signal_noise: Excellent content density. Pure educational content from university lectures adapted for YouTube. No entertainment filler.
reasoning.originality: Unique position as the leading academic voice on corporate valuation. Brings genuine expertise rarely found on YouTube.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Outstanding lasting value. Valuation principles and financial frameworks taught are timeless and form the foundation of modern finance education.
